entities.description: libmosquitto is a software library that provides an api for communicating with mqtt broker servers using the mqtt protocol
mqtt is a communication protocol used for messaging between devices  with versions 5 0 and 3 1 1 mentioned in the text
mqtt      is a server that facilitates communication between devices using the mqtt protocol

relations.description: libmosquitto uses the mqtt protocol for communication with mqtt broker servers
mqtt is the protocol used by mqtt      to facilitate communication between devices
